name: ProFlow AI
tagline: Replace your entire content team with 63 AI bots for $70/month
description: ProFlow AI automates your entire content operation: daily blog posts, weekly newsletters, social media across 6 platforms, cold email outreach, and SERP domination — all running autonomously via GitHub Actions. We replaced a $4,000/month content team. Your results will be similar.
first_comment: Hey PH! Built this after spending $4k/month on a content team that still couldn't keep up. Now it's 63 bots, $70/month, and zero management. Happy to answer any questions about the architecture, cost, or how to replicate it.
maker_comment: I'm SC Thomas, founder of NY Spotlight Report. Built the system out of necessity — content marketing was killing my margins. Now it's our main product. AMA.
